step_rationale: NET burden marker reflecting myeloperoxidase-containing neutrophil extracellular traps.
mechanism: Circulating NET component serving as marker of pathogenic neutrophil activation and thrombo-inflammatory burden post-MI.

references.title: Silent Myocardial Infarction Revisited: Immuno-metabolic Mechanisms, Multimodal Biomarkers, and Translational Diagnostics.
Linking Neutrophil Extracellular Traps and Platelet Activation: A Composite Biomarker Score for Predicting Outcomes after Acute Myocardial Infarction.
